source: IPTC NewsCodes Scene taxonomy. Full vocabulary: https://cv.iptc.org/newscodes/scene/ — This file contains a curated subset relevant to product/lifestyle photography. IPTC (International Press Telecommunications Council) maintains this as an open industry standard for media metadata.
note: Original IPTC codes cover journalistic contexts. Values here are adapted for brand/product photography settings. Code references from the original taxonomy are preserved where applicable.
usage: Select max 2 values that best describe the physical setting implied or shown in this brand content. Prefer specific over generic.

outdoor_urban.description: City streets, architecture, public spaces, commuter contexts

outdoor_nature.description: Forests, mountains, coasts, parks – natural environments

outdoor_travel.description: Airports, transit, roads, destinations – movement contexts

indoor_home.description: Domestic spaces, living rooms, kitchens, bedrooms

indoor_workspace.description: Offices, desks, coworking spaces, professional environments

studio_neutral.description: Clean background, controlled lighting, no location context – product focus

sports_active.description: Gyms, outdoor sport, physical activity contexts

unspecified.description: Setting cannot be determined from text alone

for_image_generation: Setting values map directly to background/environment in image prompts: 'outdoor_urban' → city street, concrete, glass, people in motion; 'studio_neutral' → white or grey seamless, soft box lighting
